'''Jerem Cadmir''', born on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] scientist of [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. When he, [[Tee-ubo Doole]], [[Bendodi Ballow-Reese]], and [[Luther De'Ono]] were sent out to investigate an incoming storm, all but Jerem succumbed to noxious fumes being emitted by [[dweebit]]s planted there by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yomin Carr]] as part of the preparation for his species' [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]]. Cadmir, on what little [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] he had left, attempted to get back to the ExGal-4 compound, but was confronted and killed by Yomin Carr, who broke his neck and felt he had shown a great amount of respect by killing him honorably.<ref name="VP" />
